implement.note: Implemented TapeAnalyzer.ts (analyzeTape + 5 pure helper functions: hesitationFrames, commitmentSpeed, panicBurstCount, platformCheckCount, isMovementEdge/isActiveInputEdge). Caught + fixed a dead-calibration bug during implementation: hesitationFrameThreshold was defined in CampaignProfile but never consumed -- fixed before writing tests. No TODOs/stubs.

verify.note: npm test: 378/378 green (363 baseline + 15 new TapeAnalyzer tests covering every signal in isolation, held-vs-edge input distinction, greedy burst non-overlap, two-profile externalization proofs for hesitation/panic/platform-check). npx tsc --noEmit clean. npm run build clean.

acceptance.criterion: S6.2 delivers the P6-owned data-derivation share of REQ-032: TapeAnalyzer.analyzeTape derives all six behavioral signals (hesitation, platform-checking, commitment speed, panic cycles, drop-off, retry cadence) purely from ArchetypeRun, with zero P8 telemetry dependency (dm-0044). REQ-032 stays IN_PROGRESS in the backlog -- P8's live-collection share (design adapts to these signatures in production) is unbuilt and owned by a later phase.
